summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VenuLoQ Phase 6 - RM Mobile Dashboard + Action Workflow Polish. Backend: 36/36 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified working including urgency strip, attention view, all cases view, lead detail with action modals, blocker/overdue banners, and stage advancement.

rm_login.detail: rm1@venulock.in / rm123 logs in successfully with role 'rm'

action_summary_returns_data.detail: Returns total_leads, active_leads, todays_follow_ups, overdue, blocked, recent_activity, stage_counts

action_summary_overdue_has_customer_name.detail: Overdue items include lead_id, customer_name, scheduled_at

action_summary_blocked_has_blocker_info.detail: Blocked items include lead_id, customer_name, blocker details

my_leads_returns_enriched_data.detail: Returns leads with follow_up_date, is_overdue, blocker fields

lead_detail_returns_full_data.detail: Returns blocker, time_extension, next_follow_up, is_overdue fields

request_time_success.detail: Creates time extension with reason and days_requested

escalate_success.detail: Creates blocker with active=true, reason, severity

resolve_blocker_success.detail: Sets blocker.active=false and adds resolved_at timestamp

meeting_outcome_requires_fields.detail: Returns 422 when outcome or summary is missing

meeting_outcome_success.detail: Creates note with outcome, summary, next_action

meeting_outcome_creates_follow_up.detail: Creates follow-up when follow_up_date is provided

add_note_success.detail: Creates note with content, note_id, created_at

rm_dashboard_loads.detail: Dashboard loads with RM name greeting

needs_attention_view.detail: Shows overdue items, today's follow-ups, blocked items, recent activity

all_cases_view.detail: Shows search bar, stage filter chips, case cards

case_cards_with_badges.detail: Cards show stage badges, OVERDUE/BLOCKED flags, quick actions

quick_actions_on_cards.detail: Call, WhatsApp, Details buttons on each card

lead_detail_loads.detail: Shows customer info, stage progress, action buttons

note_modal_works.detail: Opens modal, accepts text, submits successfully

meeting_outcome_modal_works.detail: Shows outcome options, summary, next action, follow-up date

blocker_banner_shows.detail: Shows 'Blocker Active (medium)' with reason and Resolve button

stage_advance_panel.detail: Shows 'Move to [Next Stage]' with optional note input

messages_tab_works.detail: Shows message list, input field, send button

activity_timeline.detail: Shows all logged actions with timestamps and user names

critical_code_review_comments: workflow.py: Well-structured with clear separation of RM action endpoints (request-time, escalate, resolve-blocker, meeting-outcome)
RMDashboard.js: Clean mobile-first design with urgency strip, attention/all-cases views, and proper data-testid attributes
RMLeadDetail.js: Comprehensive action modals with proper validation, activity timeline, and stage advancement
All actions properly logged to timeline with user attribution and timestamps
Blocker and overdue states correctly propagated from backend to frontend
seed_data_creation: Used existing test leads with follow-ups and blockers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6 RM Mobile Dashboard fully tested. Routes: /team/rm/dashboard (dashboard), /team/rm/leads/:leadId (lead detail). Action endpoints: request-time, escalate, resolve-blocker, meeting-outcome, note. Dashboard has urgency strip (overdue/today/blocked/active counts) and two views (Needs Attention, All Cases). Lead detail has 4 action buttons, blocker/overdue banners, activity timeline, messages tab, and stage advance bar. WhatsApp and phone calls are MOCKED (generates wa.me/tel: links only).

mocked_apis_list: WhatsApp message dispatch (generates wa.me link only)
